summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Feeling Search (Chat) functionality. Backend API endpoints working 100%, frontend UI components functional with proper integration. Minor modal interaction issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal close button has overlay interception preventing clicks in some cases
ui_bugs.workaround: Escape key still works to close modal

passed_tests: Search input with correct placeholder text
Search results overlay with movie count display
Movie cards rendering with match percentages and vibe tags
Multiple feeling query types (happy, sad, nostalgic, romantic, etc.)
Backend feeling mappings and semantic search
TMDB API integration for movie data
Movie grid masonry layout in results
All existing backend endpoints still functional
